utterance: How many shots did Jayson Tatum take from the left corner in Q4?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Jayson Tatum%') AND x <= -220 AND y <= 90 AND period = 4
notes: Player name resolved; zone boundaries validated against coordinate system

gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE shot_type = '3PT' AND y > 90 AND shot_distance > 220
notes: Implicit: same player as Turn 1 if multi-turn; marked as standalone single-turn

utterance: With less than 1 minute remaining in Q4?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE game_clock <= 60 AND period = 4
notes: Clarified: game_clock (time left in period) not shot_clock

gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id IN (SELECT player_id FROM lineups WHERE lineup_role = 'starter') AND game_id IN (SELECT game_id FROM games WHERE season_type = '2023-24')
notes: Ambiguity: 'starting five' requires lineup table; needs definition of starter. Excluded from analysis pending resolution.

utterance: More made than missed in the second half?
gold_sql: SELECT period, SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as makes, SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as misses FROM shot_charts WHERE period IN (3, 4) GROUP BY period HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
notes: Correctly interpreted 'more made than missed' as HAVING clause with case statement comparison

utterance: What about his 3-pointers in the paint?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = 123 AND shot_type = '3PT' AND ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190
notes: Turn 2 of multi-turn dialogue; resolved 'his' to player_id 123 from Turn 1 context; 3PT + paint zone applied

utterance: In the Celtics-Lakers game on December 15th?
gold_sql: SELECT * FROM shot_charts WHERE game_id IN (SELECT game_id FROM games WHERE ((home_team = 'BOS' AND away_team = 'LAL') OR (home_team = 'LAL' AND away_team = 'BOS')) AND DATE(game_date) = '2023-12-15')
notes: Team names resolved (BOS, LAL); requires join on games table

utterance: Contested shots with less than 5 seconds on the shot clock?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE defender IS NOT NULL AND period_seconds_remaining < 5
notes: SCHEMA BUG FIXED: nba_api SECONDS_REMAINING = period time remaining, NOT shot clock. Renamed column to period_seconds_remaining. Query now filters on period time, not shot-clock time. Shot-clock data unavailable in this dataset — any 'shot clock' NL query must be flagged clarification_needed.

utterance: Average shooting percentage per player in the playoffs?
gold_sql: SELECT player_id, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as shooting_pct FROM shot_charts WHERE game_id IN (SELECT game_id FROM games WHERE season_type = 'Playoffs') GROUP BY player_id ORDER BY shooting_pct DESC
notes: Correctly computed percentage as FLOAT division; season_type filter applied
